python3 -c "
import csv
with open('/lustre/fast/fast/sgoel/forecasting/current_sim/final_runs_v37/opencode_aljazeeraQ12026v37_qwen36plus/26-05-02-00-01-06/agents/minimalHarness_qwen_qwen36-plus_001/workspace/market.csv') as f:
    reader = csv.DictReader(f)
    rows = list(reader)

for r in rows:
    rd = r.get('resolution_date','').strip()
    if rd and rd == '2026-03-04':
        print(f'QID: {r[\"qid\"]}')
        print(f'Title: {r[\"title\"]}')
        print(f'Background: {r[\"background\"][:300] if r[\"background\"] else \"N/A\"}')
        print('---')
"

blocks.content:
QID: 281710
Title: Who will Donald Trump name to replace Kristi Noem as US homeland security secretary by March 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-19. The US Department of Homeland Security is a cabinet department responsible for border, immigration, and domestic security matters. The president can remove a cabinet secretary and publicly name a replacement.
---
QID: 869392
Title: Alongside Jeff Merkley, who will co-introduce, by March 2026, a US Senate bill to stop top federal officials from trading on prediction markets?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-19. Prediction markets let people bet on future events. Some US lawmakers are considering ethics rules that would limit whether senior government officials can trade on these markets.
---
QID: 641254
Title: What coalition will Donald Trump announce to fight drug cartels at a South Florida summit by March 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-01-30. The United States is discussing closer security cooperation with Latin American countries on organised crime and drug trafficking. A new regional initiative may be announced soon.
---
QID: 943634
Title: What town southwest of Tehran will Iranian state media identify as the place where two schools were hit by missiles by March 31, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-19. Missile strikes in Iran are causing concern about damage to civilian buildings outside Tehran. State media may later specify which nearby town saw two school sites reportedly hit.
---
QID: 887402
Title: Which military will a preliminary US Department of Defense investigation identify as responsible for the deadly school strike in southern Iran by 11 March 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-19. Tensions involving Iran raise the risk of disputed air or missile strikes. If a deadly strike on a civilian site is later investigated, public reporting may focus on which armed force carried it out.
---
QID: 779990
Title: What Saudi city will authorities say was hit by a deadly military projectile by March 8, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-28. Military tensions in the Gulf are rising, and cross-border strikes could affect civilian neighborhoods inside Saudi Arabia.
---
QID: 765155
Title: Which capital city will see homes near the US Embassy ordered evacuated during the regional conflict by 6th March 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-25. Gulf governments are monitoring rising tensions involving Iran, Israel, and US positions in the region. If the conflict spreads, authorities may order protective evacuations near diplomatic sites.
---
QID: 863162
Title: Which Gulf country will report that an Iranian missile hit a state-run oil refinery by March 6, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-26. Gulf states contain major energy infrastructure that could be exposed if a wider regional war breaks out. Governments or state energy operators would likely publicly report any direct strike on such facilities.
---
